core.zh: 私有工作区结构清晰，敏感资产保持 local-only。
core.en: Private workspace layout is clear; sensitive assets stay local-only.

core.zh: 统一 contract runner 持续接入真实 C++ source-contract、neutral descriptor 和 analyzer gates。
core.en: The unified contract runner keeps absorbing real C++ source-contracts, neutral descriptors, and analyzer gates.

core.zh: 基础协议对象、reader/writer、recent-authority 与 DecodeBuffer 类边界继续扩展。
core.en: Core protocol objects, reader/writer checks, recent-authority, and DecodeBuffer-style boundaries continue to expand.

core.zh: ZTL 多个 shard 的 metadata / opaque-token facts 已大规模进入 formal promotion；不声明生产 ABI/layout/lifetime 行为。
core.en: Metadata / opaque-token facts from multiple ZTL shards have moved into formal promotion at scale; production ABI/layout/lifetime behavior is not claimed.

core.zh: 网络边界与 DecodeBuffer 类 source-contract 面已有基础骨架；底层生命周期仍未完整建模。
core.en: Network boundaries and DecodeBuffer-style source-contract coverage have a basic skeleton; low-level lifecycle modeling remains incomplete.

core.zh: 登录阶段的角色外观与选择结果已有证据；完整登录包集合仍未完成。
core.en: Login-stage avatar look and selection result evidence exists; the full login packet set remains incomplete.

core.zh: Field 相关 raw-member、timebase、party helper、quest-clear、transition gates 等持续推进；完整 CharacterData 仍是长尾。
core.en: Field-related raw-member, timebase, party helper, quest-clear, and transition gates keep advancing; full CharacterData remains a long tail.

core.zh: local movement fixture 已 decode/re-encode；option-key-2 raw/neutral 边界已推进，但更广 runtime correlation 仍 blocked。
core.en: A clean local movement fixture is decoded/re-encoded; option-key-2 raw/neutral boundaries advanced, but broader runtime correlation remains blocked.

core.zh: ActionMan path contract 与 action mapping helpers 已进入 host-side contract；完整资源系统未重构。
core.en: ActionMan path contracts and action mapping helpers are in the host-side contract set; the full resource system is not reconstructed.

core.zh: string accessor、pointer-view、ASCII search/compare 的窄 host-side source-contract facts 已记录；不声明生产布局或 verified。
core.en: Narrow host-side string accessor, pointer-view, and ASCII search/compare source-contract facts are recorded; production layout and verified status are not claimed.

core.zh: Median neutral 的 6 个 table facts 已进入 ABI doc / promotion record；不声明 production sort correctness。
core.en: Six Median neutral table facts are documented in ABI docs / promotion records; production sort correctness is not claimed.

core.zh: 低风险 source-contract 已从计划/metadata 转向持续 C++ 落地，覆盖 field、context、control、movement、item/data、script/resource、UI 等方向。
core.en: Low-risk source-contract work has shifted from plans/metadata into sustained C++ landing across field, context, control, movement, item/data, script/resource, UI, and related lanes.

core.zh: control/movement 相关 Init、input、ladder/rope、writer/update、impact 等已进入 source-contract-with-limits。
core.en: Control/movement-related Init, input, ladder/rope, writer/update, impact, and related lanes are reviewed as source-contract-with-limits.

core.zh: context 相关 GetCurFieldID、request-state、friend result、limited wrapper 等多条 descriptor lane 已实现或 closeout。
core.en: Context lanes including GetCurFieldID, request-state, friend result, limited wrapper, and related descriptors have implemented/closed contracts.

core.zh: 装备质量、ItemSlot RawDecode、BSTR Data_t、ZArray/AvatarLook 等 data/item contracts 正在落地。
core.en: Data/item contracts such as equipment quality, ItemSlot RawDecode, BSTR Data_t, ZArray/AvatarLook, and related work are landing.

core.zh: quickslot、tab control、emotion/skill、control descriptors 等 UI/control-facing contracts 正在推进。
core.en: UI/control-facing contracts such as quickslot, tab control, emotion/skill, and control descriptors are advancing.

core.zh: script entry forwarders、CurseProcess、StringPool GetInstance、BSTR/resource 相关 descriptor/contract 已进入主线。
core.en: Script entry forwarders, CurseProcess, StringPool GetInstance, BSTR/resource descriptors/contracts, and related lanes have entered the main line.

core.zh: 多个 shard 的 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts 已进入 formal promotion；这不是 source intake、runtime equivalence 或 verified。
core.en: Row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts from multiple shards have entered formal promotion; these are not source intake, runtime equivalence, or verified reconstruction.

milestones.name: Sustained C++ landing
milestones.zh: 18/19 日后多条 .cpp/.h source-contract、neutral descriptor、focused contract 线持续落地。
milestones.en: After June 18/19, many .cpp/.h source-contract, neutral descriptor, and focused contract lanes have landed.

milestones.name: Host contract suite
milestones.zh: 统一 contract runner 持续接入真实 C++ source-contract lanes。
milestones.en: The unified contract runner continues to absorb real C++ source-contract lanes.

milestones.name: Formal promotions
milestones.zh: 当前 formal promotions 为 6937；verified 仍为 0。主要是 metadata / opaque-token / row-identity facts。
milestones.en: Current formal promotions are 6937; verified remains 0. These are mostly metadata / opaque-token / row-identity facts.

milestones.name: Runtime baseline
milestones.zh: runtimeBaseline 仍保持 75；没有新的 PASS 级 runtime 突破。
milestones.en: runtimeBaseline remains 75; there is no new PASS-level runtime breakthrough.

serverData.zh: 当前对照与自动化测试基线稳定。
serverData.en: Current comparison and automation baseline is stable.

serverData.zh: proof map 已对齐，广域 map corpus 与 linked-map 仍待扩展。
serverData.en: Proof maps match; broader map corpus and linked-map coverage remain pending.

serverData.zh: tuto00 正常路径和 portal CRC 已在 clean run 对齐，旧异常现象降级为 stale。
serverData.en: Normal tuto00 path and portal CRC match in clean runs; older anomaly observations are treated as stale.

serverData.zh: 计划做 overlay/catalog，不分发 WZ。
serverData.en: Planned as overlay/catalog work; WZ files are not distributed.

serverData.zh: 计划整理 v95 服务端、WZ 工具、汉化资源的可信度目录。
serverData.en: Planned trust catalog for v95 servers, WZ tools, and localization resources.
